3339090.name: Trips'n'Traps - A Vicious Odyssey
3339090.description:
Play this graphic adventure with a surreal and decadent aesthetic.

Our protagonist can use unique abilities to avoid traps, explore the environment, interact with characters and objects, and solve puzzles to progress through the story. You will travel through strange worlds in search of your friends, encountering surprising characters and vastly different settings.

FIND YOUR FRIENDS!

One day, while heading to the park for her usual meetup with friends, Rat Girl, discovers that they have mysteriously vanished.

Will you be able to reunite them?

TRAVEL THROUGH DREAMLIKE, DECADENT... AND TRULY PECULIAR WORLDS!

Determined to find them, she sets out on a journey and soon ventures into astonishing places she never imagined could exist.

Dare to explore worlds lost in vice.

SOLVE PUZZLES AND RIDDLES!

Pay attention to small details in each scene, interact with secondary characters, use your unique abilities, and combine objects.

Everything will be essential to progress in the story!
3339090.supported_languages: 英语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
